home_feature_languages: Languages: PL / EN (US, UK) / FR / IT / DE / ES
home_benefit_1: You turn a supplier quotation into a client-ready offer — fast, clear and in your style
home_benefit_2: You draw windows, shutters and doors (including interior) — choose colors and variants without file chaos
home_benefit_3: You add your selling price and costs — margin, installation, transport, accessories and everything you sell
home_benefit_4: You generate professional PDFs ready to send — the offer looks like it came from a big company, even if made in 5 minutes
demo_overlay_text: Click the "Try demo" button to enter demo mode and see how quickly you can prepare a quotation.
demo_overlay_close_hint: If you want to hide this hint, click the "Hide" button.
demo_login_hint: Log in with these details to enter demo mode.
demo_banner_body: No registration needed. Enter demo mode to test the window quotation workflow.
demo_banner_step_3: Explore the window configurator and quoting flow
create_tenant_note: In production, create the tenant after payment webhook.
tenant_created: Tenant created. You can log in now.
dashboard_hint: Go to Quotes to create and export PDF offers.
admin_subtitle: Manage tenants, users, subscriptions and billing providers.
pdf_price_mode_title: Choose how prices should appear in the PDF
pdf_price_mode_hint: Decide whether the PDF should show all prices, only the final total, or no prices at all.
pdf_demo_block_title: PDF not available on the demo plan
pdf_demo_block_message: Generating PDF quotes is not available on the demo plan. To generate PDFs, register and purchase a plan.
demo_action_block_title: Action unavailable on the demo plan
demo_action_block: This action is disabled on the demo plan. Purchase a subscription to unlock full access.
billing_subscribe_note: Choose a plan and payment provider to activate billing.
billing_change_note: Upgrades are applied immediately. Downgrades start after the current period ends.
billing_change_scheduled: Downgrade scheduled for the end of the current period.
billing_change_immediate: Plan upgraded. Changes are active now.
history_note: MVP uses webhook events as history (later: invoices/receipts from provider).
no_subscription_yet: No active subscription detected. If you just purchased, refresh in a moment.
no_tenant_billing: This account is not attached to a tenant (e.g. super admin).
name: Name
center_post_pane_type_hint: Sash opening types follow movable mullion.
pricing_stripe_desc: Checkout integration scaffolded. Configure keys in backend.
pricing_paypal_desc: Adapter stub included. Implement when ready.
pricing_autopay_desc: Adapter stub included. Implement when ready.
pricing_lead_question: Do you have a supplier quote but nothing to send the end customer?
pricing_lead_statement: Winqo turns supplier quotations into your professional sales offer — with your margin, installation, transport and extras. Ready in minutes.
pricing_how_intro: Sound familiar? You receive a quotation from a manufacturer/supplier… and the copy–paste, Word, Excel, edits, photos and messy line items begin. The customer waits for a clear offer.
pricing_how_step_1: You take the supplier's quote as the base
pricing_how_step_2: Draw windows, roller shutters and doors (including interior ones)
pricing_how_step_4: Set your selling price and margin
pricing_how_step_5: Add transport, installation, accessories and other costs
pricing_why_body: Customers buy faster when the offer is clear and looks professional. Winqo helps you close sales, save time and keep quotes organised — no file chaos.
plans_title: Choose a plan that fits your sales
plan_starter_desc: For small teams and steady monthly demand.
plan_pro_desc: Most popular — balanced limits for active installers.
plan_select_subtitle: Pick billing and language during registration.
plan_language_hint_single: Single language access for this plan.
plan_language_hint_all: All languages included; this sets the default UI.
accept_terms: I accept the terms of service
subscribe_newsletter: I want to receive newsletter with product information and promotions
terms_required: You must accept the terms of service.
secure_payments_body: Card details stay with Stripe/PayPal. Connections are encrypted; we never see or store your payment data.
early_access_ack: I request service (app access) to start before 14 days and acknowledge I will pay for service delivered until withdrawal.
early_access_required: You must accept early service start notice.
register_details_note: Provide payer details to continue with payment.
billing_details_note: These details will be used for invoicing.
vat_invalid_will_add_vat: VAT not active in VIES — adding 23% VAT.
vat_required: VAT number is required for EU countries (except Poland).
vat_not_active_added: VAT not active — price increased by 23% VAT.
register_details_required: Please fill all required fields. Tax ID, apartment number, and region are optional.
payment_required_note: Your account is created but needs payment to activate.
payment_required_status_success: Payment completed. You can now log in.
payment_required_status_cancel: Payment canceled. Try again to activate your account.
payment_required_no_token: Missing payment token. Please log in to continue.
payment_security_body: Card details are encrypted end-to-end and processed by PCI-DSS compliant providers.
payment_security_point_encryption: TLS + tokenization protect your card details.
payment_security_point_providers: Stripe and PayPal handle payments; we never store your card data.
payment_security_point_privacy: Bank-level security with continuous fraud monitoring.
payment_supported_by: Payments are securely processed by Stripe and PayPal.
verify_email_sent_message: We sent a verification link to your email. Please click it to continue.
verify_email_error: Verification failed. The link might be invalid or expired.
forgot_password_success_msg: We sent a link to reset your password to your email.
forgot_password_user_not_found: User with this email not found.
cookie_title: Consent for cookies and data processing
cookie_body: We use cookies and similar tech for analytics, personalization, and external integrations. Accept all or pick what fits.
cookie_cat_essential_desc: Needed for the site to run.
cookie_policy_intro: How we use cookies, pixels, and similar technologies in Winqo.
cookie_policy_what_title: What are cookies and similar tech
cookie_policy_what_body: Cookies are small files saved in your browser. We also use localStorage and pixels to remember choices, secure sessions, and measure product use.
cookie_policy_types_body: Essential (required for the app), analytics (usage stats), external services (embeds and integrations), and marketing (personalized offers).
cookie_policy_manage_body: You can accept all, reject non-essential, or adjust categories in the banner. You may also clear cookies in your browser, which can affect how the app works.
cookie_policy_contact_body: Questions about cookies? Write to winqo@winqo.online.
for_who_heading: One tool for every window seller
for_who_intro: Pick your role and see how Winqo shortens quoting and wins more deals.
for_who_dealers_intro: You sell windows and don't have time for manual math, revisions, and explaining what's inside the offer?
for_who_dealers_benefit_1: build clear, professional offers clients grasp immediately
for_who_dealers_benefit_2: send PDFs that look enterprise-grade even as a solo dealer
for_who_dealers_benefit_3: cut quoting time from tens of minutes to a few clicks
for_who_dealers_benefit_4: close faster and stop losing buyers at the "I'll send the offer later" stage
for_who_dealers_cta: Winqo makes your offer sell before you even call back.
for_who_installers_intro: You install windows and doors and you quote after hours in Excel or on paper?
for_who_installers_benefit_1: price installations professionally without chaos or guesswork
for_who_installers_benefit_2: keep a clear split: product + installation + add-ons
for_who_installers_benefit_3: stop explaining where the price came from
for_who_installers_benefit_4: earn more trust and cut back on haggling
for_who_installers_cta: With Winqo you move from the installer guy to a trusted advisor.
for_who_sellers_intro: You have leads and calls, but quotes go out slowly and prospects vanish?
for_who_sellers_benefit_2: send offers that are clear, concrete, and tidy
for_who_sellers_benefit_3: keep a consistent offer standard even across a team
for_who_sellers_benefit_4: lift conversion without adding more leads
for_who_sellers_cta: Winqo helps you win deals with speed and professionalism.
for_who_summary_body: Whether you're a dealer, installer, or sales rep, Winqo turns the quote into a sales weapon.
for_who_summary_line_3: A system that truly helps sell windows.
pdf_demo_block: PDF export is disabled on the demo plan. Choose a paid plan to continue.
vies_verification_success: VAT number verified in VIES. Company data fetched from database and locked.
vies_verification_required_action: VIES verification is required. Click 'Verify VAT (VIES)'.
